name: SentinelOne, Inc.
description: SentinelOne, Inc. is a global leader in AI-powered cybersecurity, providing an autonomous security platform that protects endpoints, cloud workloads, containers, and identity. The company's Singularity Platform leverages advanced artificial intelligence and machine learning to detect, prevent, and respond to cyber threats in real-time across the entire enterprise. By unifying prevention, detection, and response into a single agent, SentinelOne enables organizations to achieve machine-speed security and visibility, effectively defending against sophisticated modern attacks and ransomware while reducing the complexity of security operations.
